mapper.insert: insert into setmeal (name, category_id, price, status, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user, image, description) values (#{name}, #{categoryId}, #{price}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{createUser}, #{updateUser}, #{image}, #{description})
mapper.delete:
delete from setmeal where id in
#{id}
mapper.select: select s.id as s_id, s.name as s_name, s.category_id as s_category_id, s.price as s_price, s.status as s_status, s.description as s_description, s.image as s_image, s.update_time as s_update_time, c.id as c_id, c.setmeal_id as c_setmeal_id, c.dish_id as c_dish_id, c.name as c_name, c.price as c_price, c.copies as c_copies, cat.name as category_name -- 关联分类表获取分类名称 from setmeal s left join setmeal_dish c on s.id = c.setmeal_id left join category cat on s.category_id = cat.id -- 关联分类表 where s.id = #{id}
mapper.update:
update setmeal
name = #{name},
category_id = #{categoryId},
price = #{price},
status = #{status},
image = #{image},
description = #{description},
update_time = #{updateTime}, update_user = #{updateUser}
where id = #{id}
